case_title: MAR, JANET BETH VS RICHMAN, PAULA C. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,395.00 FILED BY MAR, JANET BETH AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMAN, PAULA C. STEVEN SPEARS,MASON MCDUFFIE/FRANCISCAN PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SPEARS,MASON MCDUFFIE/FRANCISCAN PROPERTIES PLAINTIFF TO RESET HEARING AS TO DEFENDANT;RICHMAN AND TO SERVE RICHMAN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RESET AND SERVE PAULA C. RICHMAN CONTINUED FROM SEP-28-1995 TO NOV-07-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
THIS IS COURTS OWN MOTION, IN ORDER TO RESET CASE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
DEF S REQUEST F/CONTINUANCE ON MOTION RESERVED FOR NOV.07 AT 10:30AM &SENT TO DEP C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMAN, PAULA C.
RSVD DTE NOV. 7, 1995 AT 10:30AM'S ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAR, JANET BETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHMAN, PAULA C. $2,395.00 PRINCIPAL, $56.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,451.00, MOTION TO RESET AND RESERVE PAULA C. RICHMAN GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AMENDED JUDGMENT BECAUSE SYSTEM WILL NOT RENDER NEW JUDGMENT ON A GENERIC MOTION.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RESET AND SERVE PAULA C. RICHMAN OF NOV-07-1995, GRANTED
